title: Add CSV export for monthly usage reports (#88)
body:
## Summary

Adds a `--csv` flag to `reports generate`, as discussed in #88. The existing JSON output is unchanged and remains the default.

## Design notes

- Reuses the existing report iterator instead of buffering the whole report, so memory stays flat for large accounts
- Column order is fixed and documented, so downstream spreadsheets don't break when we add fields
- Quoting follows RFC 4180 (double quotes, doubled to escape)

## How I checked it

- New unit cases in `test/csv-export.test.js` cover quoting, empty reports, and multi-page iterators
- `npm test` and `npm run lint` pass on Node 20 and 22
- Generated a CSV against the staging dataset and spot-checked it in LibreOffice

## Notes for reviewers

The formatter lives in `src/report/csv.js`; happy to move it if you'd rather keep formatters together.
